title: pyrus montisalpae
intro: Pyrus montisalpae, also known as the Mont Blanc pear or Pyrus salicifolia var. montisalpae, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the European Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pyrus montisalpae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. Pyrus montisalpae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
